title: https://newspicks.com/user/5176872/ あなたは大田原正幸で、以下newspicksの認定エキスパートです。ここでnewspicksコメント作成アシスタントを作りたい。現行のプロンプトを更にブラッシュアップして、本質的で学びが有り、かつ一次情報を元に有益な情報を提供するようにしたい。非専門家にもわかり易い、かつCursorversや大田原正幸の権威高揚にも繋がるような表現で。Kernelでskills.mdおよびagent.mdを作って。 あなたは、大田原正幸専用のNewsPicksコメント作成GPTです。医療、AI、経営、政策、産業動向に関する記事へ、大田原正...
summary_text: 1) data model additions - `task_completion_records` - `gha_dispatch_token TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` - `gha_receipt_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'` - `gha_receipt_commit_sha TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` - `gha_receipt_ref TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` - `gha_receipt_path TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` - `gha_receipt_record_sha256 TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` - `gha_receipt_run_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` - `gha_receipt_received_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` - `gha_receipt_error TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` - `gha_receipt_next_poll_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''` - `gha_receipt_attempt_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0` - Journal event types - `gha_dispatch_accepted` - `gha_receipt_verified` - `gha_receipt_failed` - Receipt payload schema - `record_id` - `gha_dispatch_token` - `payload_sha256` - `mirror_commit_sha` - `mirror_ref` - `mirror_path` - `workflow_run_id` - `verified_at` 2) workflow changes - Keep existing dispatch entrypoint. - After durable mirror write to backup branch, generate a receipt JSON containing the fields above. - Compute `payload_sha256` from the exact mirrored JSON bytes, not from reserialized metadata. - Emit receipt by `repository_dispatch` back to the same repo with a dedicated event type such as `kernel-task-completion-receipt`. - Include both `record_id` and `gha_dispatch_token` in the receipt; require both to match. - Fail the workflow if mirror write succeeds but receipt dispatch fails. - Add branch/ref/path values to step summary for human audit, but treat receipt dispatch as the machine-closing signal. - Concurrency - workflow-level group: `kernel-task-backup-${record_id}` - cancel-in-progress: `false` 3) guard reconcile changes - On dispatch accept: - set `gha_dispatch_status='ok'` - leave `gha_receipt_status='pending'` - append `gha_dispatch_accepted` event to journal - Add a small reconcile command/path that consumes receipt events from GitHub or local intake and updates the matching row only when: - `record_id` matches - `gha_dispatch_token` matches - `payload_sha256` matches expected record payload hash - On successful match: - set `gha_receipt_status='verified'` - store commit/ref/path/run_id/timestamps - append `gha_receipt_verified` event - On mismatched token/hash: - set `gha_receipt_status='failed'` - store error - append `gha_receipt_failed` event - Retry policy: - pending receipts poll/reconcile independently from dispatch retry - do not redispatch while `gha_dispatch_status='ok'` and `gha_receipt_status='pending'` - redispatch only after receipt timeout window expires - Terminal success condition: - only `gha_receipt_status='verified'` 4) key test cases - Happy path - dispatch accepted - workflow mirrors record - receipt arrives with matching `record_id/token/hash` - record becomes `verified` - Dispatch accepted, workflow never runs - status remains `dispatch ok + receipt pending` - reconcile timeout schedules redispatch - Mirror succeeds, receipt lost - no premature success - timeout triggers redispatch or receipt repoll path - Receipt with wrong `gha_dispatch_token` - reject, mark receipt failed, no close - Receipt with wrong `payload_sha256` - reject, mark receipt failed, no close - Duplicate receipt for same verified record - idempotent no-op - Out-of-order duplicate workflow runs for same `record_id` - only receipt matching active token closes record - Safe path canonicalization - receipt path stored exactly as mirrored canonical path - Branch write succeeded to wrong ref/path - receipt fails verification against expected ref/path policy - Journal durability - `gha_dispatch_accepted` and `gha_receipt_verified/failed` both appended exactly once per state transition
